app.name: XMLUI
app.one_liner: A declarative UI framework for building modern web applications using XML markup and flexible theming with minimal React or CSS knowledge.

screens.name: Main Application View
screens.purpose: Display dynamic UI composed of declarative XML components bound to live data sources.
primary_actions: Render data-bound components like Select and Table

rust_commands.name: list_items
rust_commands.purpose: Fetch and display list of items from a data source using declarative binding.

rust_commands.name: save_item
rust_commands.purpose: Persist user-modified data items to backend or local storage.

mvp_plan: week 1: Implement basic data binding between Select and Table components
week 1: Set up XMLUI starter kit with Invoice demo
week 1: Verify theming customization with subset of 3639 variables
acceptance_tests: Application loads and renders XML-defined UI with live data binding without scripting.
Theme variables apply correctly across all 92 core components.
